section.heading: Establishment of trout hatchery in Pisgah National Forest

content.p: The Secretary of the Interior, after consulting with the Secretary of Agriculture, shall establish, construct, equip, operate, and maintain a trout hatchery at an appropriate location on the Davidson River in the Pisgah National Forest, North Carolina.

note.heading: Appropriations
note.p: Section 2 of act June 18, 1956, authorized the appropriation of $375,000 to carry out the purposes of this section.
